verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I Thank God for His love I Thank God for His peace I Thank God for His grace And for all the joys He brings

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I Thank God for his strength I Thank God for all his power I Thank God for His truth, His mercy sees me through

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I Thank God for my life I Thank God for my home I Thank God for my friends, And that I am not alone

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I Thank God for this world I Thank God for the sky I Thank God for the stars, in heaven above

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: I Thank God for His plan I Thank God for His way I Thank God for His hand, that leads me through each day

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: I Thank God for my trust I Thank God for my hope I Thank God for my faith, My heart for Him

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: He'll always be here Here in my heart Always inside Always here

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: I Thank God for His love I Thank God for His peace I Thank God for His grace, and for all the joys He brings I Thank God for his strength I Thank God for all his power I Thank God for His son, for all He's done

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: He has a home A place for me In heaven above
